_DEPRECATED: The shared resolver bin/lib/loom-links.mjs now owns the canonical
NAME->location binding AND the downstream `shards` block (resolveShard).
repin-downstream.mjs reads loom-links config first (unified path) and
falls back to this legacy repin-targets.local.json only when no
loom-links config exists (back-compat shim — still active, not removed).
Operators SHOULD migrate: copy your `reposRoot` + `shards` into
This .example file is retained for the legacy shim; do NOT delete it.
Keys beginning with `_` are ignored by the loader.
_README: Copy this file to `repin-targets.local.json` (same directory) and fill
in your real downstream repo paths. `repin-targets.local.json` is
gitignored and is NEVER committed or synced — it is the only place the
downstream-repo registry lives. The shipped script carries only this
loader + schema, so no engagement/consumer identifiers appear in any
reposRoot : base directory holding all downstream repo checkouts.
Supports a leading `~` (expands to $HOME). Each shard
path below is resolved relative to this root.
shards    : object mapping a shard label -> array of repo paths
(relative to reposRoot). Shard labels are arbitrary;
Keys beginning with `_` (like this one) are ignored by the loader.
